'''Fall Topas''' was [[Plat Mallar]]'s [[Grannan]] mother and wife of [[Plat Hovath]]. Before being [[Death/Legends|killed]] in the [[Yevethan Purge]], she was a plant [[Biologist/Legends|biologist]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Polneye]]. Her son would later recant that she was quite beautiful.

==Appearances==
*''[[Before the Storm]]'' {{1stm}}
*[[Before the Storm (abridged audiobook)|''Before the Storm'' abridged audiobook]] {{Mo}}
